input.question: Prove that the value 152 in this data set is an outside value.

output.answer:
5-point summary: $88,101,114,120,152$

$$
\begin{aligned}
& \mathrm{IQR}=120-101=19 \
& \text { Fence }_{\text {Upper }}=120+(1.5)(19)=148.5
\end{aligned}
$$

The value 152 is outside the upper fence.

observations.description: The number of observations in the data set.

value_152.description: The specific value in the data set that needs to be proven as an outlier.
